requires_comfy_ui: Stock ComfyUI with Wan 2.1 diffusion path (see ComfyUI_examples/wan); upgrade Comfy if nodes are missing
optional_models_note: Larger Wan 14B checkpoints are supported in principle — swap unet via HAM_COMFYUI_WAN_VIDEO_MODEL_NAME after placing the file under diffusion_models/
notes: LOCAL DEV ONLY. Template derived from upstream ComfyUI Wan T2V example graphs (API format): UNETLoader + CLIPLoader (wan) + EmptyHunyuanLatentVideo + ModelSamplingSD3 + KSampler + VAELoader + CreateVideo + SaveVideo. Operator must install weights on the worker; no checkpoints in-repo. Override filenames with HAM_COMFYUI_WAN_VIDEO_MODEL_NAME, HAM_COMFYUI_WAN_CLIP_MODEL_NAME, HAM_COMFYUI_WAN_VAE_MODEL_NAME. If CreateVideo rejects Wan decode tensors, disable HAM patching and replace nodes 50–51 in a worker-local export while keeping comfy_patches targets (nodes 6, 7, 3) aligned.
